whatIf.hint: Choose businesses and new deal counts to see cash and P/L impact.

settings.title: Fixed Costs & Opening Balances
settings.hint: Fixed costs drive the payment calendar; opening balances make cash estimates accurate.

empty.noOpeningBalance: Opening balance not set; cash is estimated from ledger only

legacy.title: Legacy orders only
legacy.description: New EP orders use package configuration. This area remains for existing orders that still use the old fee and commission scheme.

commissions.description: Package commission is the default rule. Specific cases can override it in the case detail Commission area.

errors.sortOrderTaken: This sort order is already taken by another module
errors.sortOrderOutOfRange: Sort order is out of the course's range

fields.name: Name

fields.appealHint: Appeal letter for this submission (PDF / Word, etc.)

errors.category_required: Expense entries require an expense category
errors.fx_rate_required: Non-SGD entries require an FX rate

reports.title: Financial Reports
reports.cashBasisHint: Cash basis; accrual adjustments are handled by the accountant; exported data can be mapped to Form C-S / ACRA templates.
reports.byCompany: Net profit before tax by company

businessFinance.noSchemeForBusiness: No fees & commission scheme for this business yet

milestones.title: Collection Milestones
milestones.hint: Milestones split one-time revenue into deposit, progress, and final payments.

milestoneSplit.title: Milestone Allocation
milestoneSplit.empty: Please add stages in the Collection Milestones tab first
milestoneSplit.totalWarning: The total is not 100%. Saving will use the percentages currently entered.
milestoneSplit.mixedHint: Percent-based stages should total 100%; fixed-amount stages use that amount directly, and the remaining balance is assigned to the final stage.

preview.title: Demo profit-rate preview
preview.openEndedHint: Some recurring periods are missing months or events, so those open-ended totals are not included.

icaFeeShare.title: ICA Fee & Share
icaFeeShare.hint: Manage multiple ICA fee schemes. Each case selects one scheme, and its collection plan is prefilled from that scheme's total, deposit, and guarantor share.
icaFeeShare.totalHint: Contract total per case; adjustable per case
icaFeeShare.depositHint: Deposit collected on signing; balance = total − deposit
icaFeeShare.guarantorShareHint: Fixed amount paid to the guarantor each time a deposit is received (auto-recorded as payable on deposit; paid after finance confirmation)

errors.cannot_delete_default_scheme: The default scheme cannot be disabled. Set another scheme as default first.
errors.missing_required_fields: Fill in the scheme name and all amounts.

chargeSchedule.title: Collection Schedule
chargeSchedule.createPlanHint: Create a billing for this case; once created you can add charges one by one.
chargeSchedule.noPlanHint: No collection plan for this case yet. Click "Create collection plan" in the top right to start.
chargeSchedule.notFound: No collection plan for this case yet.

formula.fixed: Cleaning + maintenance + POS + subscription + bank + legal + other

messages.coupleNameRequired: Husband and wife names are required
